prompt_text: A Shen household servant in ancient Chinese livery, lean young male attendant in plain dark robe and cloth belt, rushes across the frame from left to right in a medium long shot, his robe hem flying upward as he sprints out of the corridor. He is captured mid-run with urgent forward momentum, body pitched ahead, arms driving, no hesitation. The corridor runs diagonally from left foreground to right background; a curtain corner and wooden pillar are knocked aside in the foreground, and another servant in the deep background has just been pulled into turning around. Bright daylight from outside draws a long strip of light across the old wooden floor, guiding the direction of escape.
